org.key_project.exploration

Class ExplorationExtension

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.exploration.ExplorationExtension
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine, KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar

    public class ExplorationExtension
extends java.lang.Object
implements KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel, KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine
    Entry point for the Proof Exploration Extension.

    • Method Detail

      • getContextActions

        @Nonnull
public java.util.List<javax.swing.Action> getContextActions(@Nonnull
                                                                     KeYMediator mediator,
                                                                     @Nonnull
                                                                     ContextMenuKind kind,
                                                                     @Nonnull
                                                                     java.lang.Object underlyingObject)
        Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
        A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

        Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

        Specified by:
        getContextActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
        Parameters:
        mediator - the window of the main menu
        kind - the type of context menu
        underlyingObject - the object for which the context menu is requested
        Returns:
        non-null, emptiable list of actions.
        See Also:
        KeyAction

      • getToolbar

        @Nonnull
public javax.swing.JToolBar getToolbar(MainWindow mainWindow)

        Parameters:

        Returns:
        non-null

      • getPanels

        @Nonnull
public java.util.Collection<TabPanel> getPanels(@Nonnull
                                                         MainWindow window,
                                                         @Nonnull
                                                         KeYMediator mediator)
        Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
        Initialization and return of the sub components.

        Called before any other method; can be used to construct the UI.

        Specified by:
        getPanels in interface KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
        Parameters:
        window - parent of this extension
        mediator - the current mediator

      • getMainMenuActions

        @Nonnull
public java.util.List<javax.swing.Action> getMainMenuActions(@Nonnull
                                                                      MainWindow mainWindow)
        Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
        A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

        Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

        Specified by:
        getMainMenuActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
        Parameters:
        mainWindow - the window of the main menu
        Returns:
        non-null, emptiable list of actions.
        See Also:
        KeyAction
